page.title: SEO Score
page.description: Composite traditional-search score for your brand across the queries we track

impression_volume.name: Impression Volume
impression_volume.description: Total search impressions across the brand's tracked queries

click_through_rate.name: Click-Through Rate
click_through_rate.description: Impression-weighted CTR across the brand's tracked queries

rank_quality.name: Rank Quality
rank_quality.description: Impression-weighted average position across the brand's tracked queries

aio_presence.name: AI Overview Presence
aio_presence.description: Share of the brand's tracked queries where Quaynt detected an AI Overview citation

factor.insufficientDataHint: Collect more data over the selected period to score this factor

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.empty: No recommendations — your score is strong across every factor
recommendations.estDeltaTooltip: Estimated composite lift if this factor alone reaches 75, with all other factors held constant. Actual impact depends on how factors interact.

impression_volume.title: Increase search impression volume
impression_volume.description: Your tracked queries drew few impressions in this period. Expand indexable coverage for these topics.

click_through_rate.title: Improve click-through rate
click_through_rate.description: Your listings are being shown but not clicked. Strengthen titles, meta descriptions, and structured data.

rank_quality.title: Improve average position
rank_quality.description: Your average rank is outside the first page. Address the content and authority gaps behind your weakest queries.

aio_presence.title: Increase AI Overview presence
aio_presence.description: Few of your tracked queries trigger an AI Overview citation for your brand. Earn coverage from authoritative sources and use structured answers.

NO_GSC_CONNECTION.title: Connect Google Search Console
NO_GSC_CONNECTION.description: Connect a GSC property to start computing your SEO score

NO_ENABLED_PROMPT_SETS.title: No prompt sets tracking this brand
NO_ENABLED_PROMPT_SETS.description: Enable a prompt set that tracks this brand to compute its SEO score

NO_BRAND_QUERY_SET.title: No tracked queries yet
NO_BRAND_QUERY_SET.description: Once prompt runs produce citations, we can correlate them with your GSC data

INSUFFICIENT_FACTORS.title: Not enough data yet
INSUFFICIENT_FACTORS.description: Fewer than three factors had enough data to score this period

GSC_IMPRESSION_BUG_2025_2026.title: GSC data quality notice
GSC_IMPRESSION_BUG_2025_2026.body: Google disclosed an impression-logging bug affecting data from 13 May 2025 to 3 April 2026. Scores covering this window may under- or over-report traffic.

errors.brandRequired: Select a brand to see its SEO score

alert.thresholdHint: Alert when composite score drops below this value
